trustStandard: For every in-scope book and every translation lane, the app must either reproduce the correct source text at the correct displayed book/chapter/verse address, or omit that translation for that book/address because no legitimate source witness exists. The app must not synthesize missing translation text, silently shift source text to the wrong address, or treat governance markers as textual trust.

DRB.workLeft: Compare active text directly against source Bible for this lane.

KJV.workLeft: Confirm every displayed verse matches source and every source/address absence is visible and non-synthetic.

NABRE.workLeft: Confirm every displayed verse matches source and every source/address absence is visible and non-synthetic.

NRSV.workLeft: Compare active text directly against source Bible for this lane.

Rotherham.workLeft: Ensure the app does not offer synthetic text and exposes/handles the absence cleanly.
